name: Open Faced Reuben Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Sliced corned beef, finely chopped
1/2 cup Lofat mayonnaise or salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly spread mustard on each toasted bread slice and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
2. Mix drained sauerkraut, finely chopped corned beef, shredded swiss cheese, and mayonnaise (or salad dressing) in a bowl.
3. Spread about one-third of the mixture onto each toast slice.
4. Place the covered sandwich in the preheated oven and bake for approximately 10 minutes, or until the sauerkraut mixture is hot and the cheese is melted.
5. Remove from the oven and cut sandwiches into halves.
